control_items.name: ACTASAP Pilot Phase 1
evidence_required_to_unlock: A UK registered academic institution confirms it will lead or apply as the eligible ACTASAP applicant.
A TTO, commercialisation office, research office, or authorised academic lead confirms support.
The academic lead confirms an ACT-related idea, scope ownership, and no-subsidy/no selective commercial advantage position.
Aureon/R&A role is confirmed as non-funded collaborator, validation support, subcontract route where allowed, or another compliant role.
Project scope, validation work package, eligible cost basis, dates, and budget owner are evidenced.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: create or complete the ACTASAP IFS application under the eligible academic institution lead, with Aureon/R&A only in the evidenced permitted role.

control_items.name: Full ADOPT Grant: Round 8

unlock_contacts.target: Innovate UK Business Connect ADOPT facilitator route

evidence_required_to_unlock: An active farming, growing, or forestry business based in England confirms it will lead the Full ADOPT application.
At least one other UK farming, growing, or forestry business confirms collaboration and grant-claiming or project role as required.
A registered ADOPT Project Facilitator is identified and confirms role, or the support route confirms how to appoint one.
The farm problem statement, trial site, trial method, and practical adoption objective are evidenced.
Eligible project budget, cost split, partner roles, and permitted Aureon/R&A role are confirmed.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: create or complete the Full ADOPT IFS application with the England farming lead and collaborator/facilitator evidence.

control_items.name: ADOPT Facilitator Support Grant: Round 10

unlock_contacts.target: Innovate UK Business Connect ADOPT facilitator route

evidence_required_to_unlock: An active farming, growing, or forestry business based in England confirms it is the single applicant or route owner.
A registered ADOPT Project Facilitator is identified, eligible, and available for the application-development work.
Facilitator scope, procurement/engagement route, price, role, and applicant authority are evidenced.
The role for Aureon/R&A is confirmed as permitted support only, not unsupported direct applicant status.
control_items.portal_action_after_unlock: Only after every evidence item above is present: proceed only under the eligible England farm business/facilitator route and do not apply as R&A direct applicant.

do_not_mark_submit_ready_until: Every required route-specific evidence item is present in an auditable local or Drive/Gmail-derived artifact.
The evidence identifies authorised legal entities, named contacts, roles, budgets, applicant authority, and permitted Aureon/R&A role.
The IFS portal answers can be completed without guessing academic lead, farm lead, facilitator, role, finance, farm site, scope, or budget facts.
The final portal submission receives exact action-time approval for the destination application and payload.

controls: No IFS portal field was changed.
No partner invitation, upload, award terms acceptance, or final submission was performed.
This packet is an internal Aureon submission control artifact, not a representation that evidence exists.
